assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain every required section. Task 1 has Repository (trustify-backend), Target Branch (main), Description, Files to Create (advisory_summary.rs), Files to Modify (mod.rs), Implementation Notes (references SbomSummary pattern), Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (2 items). Tasks 2-6 similarly contain all required sections. Task 2 has Files to Modify only (no Files to Create, but at least one is present). Every task has at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files: task-1-add-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-add-severity-aggregation-service-method.md, task-3-add-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-add-cache-invalidation-for-advisory-summaries.md, task-5-add-threshold-query-parameter.md, task-6-add-integration-tests-for-advisory-summary.md. 6 is within [3, 10].
Every task file has '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': Task 1 line 4, Task 2 line 4, Task 3 line 4, Task 4 line 4, Task 5 line 4, Task 6 line 4.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3. Task 6 depends on Task 3 and Task 4. This forms a DAG: 1->2->3->4->6, 3->5, 3->6. No cycles exist -- topological ordering is 1,2,3,4,5,6 (or 1,2,3,5,4,6).

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files exist in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, tests/Cargo.toml. All created files are within existing directories from the structure: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (within sbom/model/), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (within sbom/endpoints/), tests/api/advisory_summary.rs (within tests/api/).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md lists specific changes: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields critical, high, medium, low, total', 'Add get_advisory_summary method to SbomService that queries the sbom_advisory join table', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler', 'Support optional ?threshold=critical query parameter', 'Add cache invalidation hook in the advisory ingestion pipeline'. All entries name specific structs, methods, endpoint paths, and technical details.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have '## Repository' with only 'trustify-backend' on the following line -- no task lists multiple repositories. Verified in task-1 through task-6.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with substantive content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified across all task files.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Every Files to Modify path maps to an existing file in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114). Files to Create paths are in existing directories: advisory_summary.rs files in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ and endpoints/, tests/api/advisory_summary.rs in tests/api/. No invented paths found.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs (SbomSummary), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs (SbomDetails), common/src/model/paginated.rs (PaginatedResults). Task 2 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, common/src/error.rs (AppError), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs. Task 3 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs, endpoints/mod.rs. Task 4 references: modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/sbom/mod.rs. Task 5 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs, common/src/db/query.rs. Task 6 references: tests/api/sbom.rs, tests/api/advisory.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs. All cite specific file paths and symbol names from the repository structure.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': Task 1 line 7, Task 2 line 7, Task 3 line 7, Task 4 line 7, Task 5 line 7, Task 6 line 7.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a real computed SHA-256 hash -- exactly 64 lowercase hex characters, not a placeholder (<hex-digest>, <hex>), abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:<64-char-hex>'
assertion_results.evidence: No output file contains a description digest comment. Searched all 7 output files (impact-map.md and task-1 through task-6) for 'digest', 'sha256', 'sha-256', or '[sdlc-workflow]' -- none found. No digest comments were posted for any task.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention -- inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: No task file contains any reference to CONVENTIONS.md, convention applicability rationales, or the prescribed 'Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>' format. The repo-backend.md structure includes a CONVENTIONS.md file with documented conventions (Migration Patterns, Axum/SeaORM patterns, error handling, endpoint registration, response types, query helpers, testing, caching), yet no task's Implementation Notes include any 'Per CONVENTIONS.md' references or applicability rationales. There is no evidence that convention-aware enrichment was performed.
